steps.t: Tucharn can be found in Erynos in eastern Lebennin. Glathril is unclear how the Corsairs met with such a fate and asks you to speak to Tucharn.
Corsairs can be found along the road outside Erynos. Tucharn has asked you to look over the fallen Corsairs on the road out of Erynos.
Glathril can be found in Erynos in eastern Lebennin. You have examined the fallen Corsairs and should now return to Glathril.
Nimithil can be found in Ost Anglebed in north-central Lebennin. You have found the people of Erynos safe from harm, and should now tell Nimithil of w…
